import torch
import torch.nn as nn

class DKT(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=128, hidden_dim=200, num_layers=1, dropout=0.4):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_skills = num_skills
        self.inter_embed = nn.Embedding(2 * num_skills + 1, embed_dim, padding_idx=0)
        self.lstm = nn.LSTM(embed_dim, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=dropout if num_layers>1 else 0.0)
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        self.out = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)

    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects, lengths):
        B, T = skill_ids.shape
        device = skill_ids.device
        valid = (torch.arange(T, device=device).unsqueeze(0) < lengths.unsqueeze(1)).long()
        inter = (skill_ids * 2 + corrects + 1) * valid
        x = self.inter_embed(inter)
        h, _ = self.lstm(x)
        h = self.dropout(h)
        logits_all = self.out(h)  # [B, T, num_skills]
        # predict for next skill at positions 0..T-2 using next skill_ids[:,1:]
        next_skill = skill_ids[:, 1:]  # [B, T-1]
        h_prev = logits_all[:, :-1]  # [B, T-1, num_skills]
        logits = h_prev.gather(2, next_skill.unsqueeze(-1)).squeeze(-1)
        return logits
